generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T AMMONIUM ACETICUM. Chemical formula , C 2 H 3 O 2 NH 4 . Preparation , The aqueous solution know as "Spiritus Mindereri" has been employed. Authorities. Wibmer's experiments with repeated doses of the "spiritus" diluted with water. ► Scraping in the throat. ► Increased warmth in the abdomen. ► Increased warmth of the skin, especially in the face. ► Heaviness in the head. ► Causes profuse urine which contains sugar; Larrrey (in Med. Chir. Treatise), (old). Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main

keynotes.text: This is a very old medicine in great use in old-school practice for "fever mixtures." It has been experimented with by Wibmer, who experienced the following symptoms: "Scraping in throat. Increased warmth in abdomen; in the skin, especially of face. Heaviness in the head." It causes profuse flow of urine, said to contain sugar. "Bathed in sweat" is a leading indication. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main
